channel.title: Nordic Pulp & Paper Research Journal
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Nordic Pulp & Paper Research Journal

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Fractionation methods of eucalyptus kraft lignin for application in biorefinery
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0037

item.title: Pulp and paper industry side-stream materials as feed for the oleaginous yeast species Lipomyces starkeyi and Rhodotorula toruloides
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0039

item.title: Comparing classic time series models and state-of-the-art time series neural networks for forecasting as-fired liquor properties
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0025

item.title: Optimization of kraft pulping process for Sesbania aculeata (dhaincha) stems using RSM
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0027

item.title: On the nature of the selectivity of oxygen delignification
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0026

item.title: Unlocking potential: the role of chemometric modeling in pulp and paper manufacturing
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0060

item.title: Effects of chemical environment on softwood kraft pulp: exploring beyond conventional washing methods
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2023-0061

item.title: Variations in carbohydrates molar mass distribution during chemical degradation and consequences on fibre strength
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0082

item.title: Energy consumption in refiner mechanical pulping
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0073

item.title: Australian wheat and hardwood fibers for advanced packaging materials

item.title: Compression refining: the future of refining? Application to bleached kraft eucalyptus pulp
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2023-0078

item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0066

item.title: The in situ green synthesis of metal organic framework (HKUST-1)/cellulose/chitosan composite aerogel (CSGA/HKUST-1) and its adsorption on tetracycline

item.title: Evaluation of the potential use of powdered activated carbon in the treatment of effluents from bleached kraft pulp mills
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0051

item.title: Waste newspaper activation by sodium phosphate for adsorption dynamics of methylene blue
item.description: Article by Yeo Shi Hao, Norasikin Othman, Muhammad Abbas Ahmad Zaini DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/npprj-2024-0061
